# seconds(_:)

**Type Method**

Converts the specified number of seconds, as a floating-point value, into an instance of this scheduler time type.

## Declaration

```swift
static func seconds(_ s: Double) -> Self
```

## Converting seconds to scheduler time intervals

- **microseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of microseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **milliseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of milliseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **nanoseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of nanoseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **seconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of seconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
